summary: All 12 acceptance criteria verified pass. Build succeeds (tsc), 31/31 unit tests green including 11 new readInputData cases (isTTY=true guard, non-TTY parse, 0-byte empty, invalid JSON line hint, isTTY=undefined, Windows EAGAIN/EOF/UV_EOF, BOM, whitespace). Static inspection confirms readInputData() 0-arg stdin-only in input.ts:95; 10 target commands (mission/task/evidence/decision/phase/recovery/evolution) have no --data/--file flags; event.ts --data, context.ts --data, packet.ts --file/--content preserved; NO_STDIN helper noStdinError in output.ts:217; evidence add + task record add wrap readInputData in try/catch allowing empty-stdin+--set fallback with INVALID_JSON passthrough; integration.js migrated to stdin pipe (only remaining --data is intentional path-traversal test on context write, a preserved flag). Note: plugin/bin/geas bundle itself stale — out of scope, handled by task-003.

criteria_results.criterion: AC5 invalid JSON with line info
AC12 npm run build + npm test pass
